name: testWaitScopeGetSerialBitAnalyseViolationData
title: testWaitScopeGetSerialBitAnalyseViolationData
syntax: long testWaitScopeGetSerialBitAnalyseViolationData(ScopeAnalyseHandle handle, long errorNo, ScopeDutyCycleDefinition dutyCycle, ScopeBitDataDutyCycle cycleData, ScopeSerialBitAnalysisViolationData data);
description: Returns the duty cycle data and the violation data of the serial bit analysis for the error number.
